title: Company Facts
summary: The Demski Group is a US-based custom software development firm with 12+ years of experience and 600+ successful projects. Headquartered in Olean, NY, with offices in Cincinnati, OH and Kalispell, MT. Phone: 406-936-3049. Email: contact@demskigroup.com.

title: Team & Leadership
summary: Leadership/team includes Andrew Demski, Aaron Demski, and Richard Armstrong.

title: Awards & Recognition
summary: Recognized as Clutch Top Software Developers 2024, Clutch Top App Development Company 2023, Clutch Top Software 2022, named among Best Software Developers US 2024, and holds a 5/5 average Google review rating.

title: Mission Statement
summary: At The Demski Group, our mission is to empower businesses through innovative, reliable, and user-centric software solutions. We are dedicated to transforming ideas into impactful digital experiences by leveraging cutting-edge technology and fostering a culture of collaboration, creativity, and continuous improvement. Our commitment is to deliver exceptional value, exceed client expectations, and drive success through excellence in software development.

title: What Sets Demski Apart
summary: End-to-end ownership of the entire development lifecycle (project management, QA, DevOps, ongoing maintenance) so clients don't have to juggle multiple vendors. Responds to all client messages in 1 hour or less. Full-stack expertise paired with a proven QA process so software performs under pressure and evolves with the business.
